message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "Resident" as Resident
participant "WeResident" as WeResident
participant "WeID" as WeID
participant "WeService" as WeService

activate WeResident
Resident -> WeResident: Send username:password /login
alt [Provider already exist]
  WeResident -> WeID: Get Token by username:password /oauth/authorize
  WeID --> WeResident: Return Token to WeResident
  WeResident --> Resident: Return {"token": "jwt-token"}
end
deactivate WeResident

activate WeResident
WeResident -> WeService: Query services including token /weservices/services\nHeader\nAuthorization: Bear {jwt-token}
note right of WeResident: Query Service schema\n{"query":"string","status":12}
alt [above token is valid]
  WeID --> WeResident: verify token
  WeID --> WeResident: 200
  WeService --> WeResident: Response services data
  note right of WeService: Service Data Array schema\n[{"id":"string","company":"string","name":"string","rate":4.2,"image":"image.png"},{}],\n"total":10,"currentPage":1,"perPage":5}
else [Token is expired/invalid]
  WeID --> WeResident: verify token
  WeID --> WeResident: 400
  WeService --> WeResident: Response 401 status
end
deactivate WeResident

activate WeResident
WeResident -> WeService: Create Service\nPOST: /weservices/service/{serviceID}/order
note right of WeResident: Order Request schema\n{"resident":"$userID",\n"service":"$serviceID",\n"pricingModel":{},\n"noteDetail":"string",\n"address":"string",\n"schedule":Time}
WeID --> WeResident: verify token
WeID --> WeResident: 200
WeService --> WeResident: Response Service Data(JSON)
WeResident -> WeService: Comment(chat) in Order\nPOST: /weservices/order/{orderID}/comment
note right of WeResident: Comment Data\n{"content":"string"}
WeID --> WeResident: verify token
WeID --> WeResident: 200
WeService --> Resident: 200

@enduml
